rows.label: qev085905_MSG0002
rows.name: Mmm-mmm... This is a difficult one, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085905_MSG0003
rows.name:
But there is nothing I cannot do! However,
it will be a very, very high price, yes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085905_MSG0005
rows.name:
Let's say exactly ten pizzas, yes? My family
absolutely loves Earth pizzas, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085905_MSG0006
rows.name: I-Is that really all you want~~?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085905_MSG0007
rows.name:
Exactly... Ten pizzas, no! My family
absolutely loves Earth pizzas, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085905_MSG0009
rows.name:
If you order delivery for us, I will
make you a truly great bracelet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085905_MSG0008
rows.name:
The Grenade Pizza from Army Pizza is the
most delicious in the universe, yes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085905_MSG0010
rows.name:
My family and I devoured all ten of
them in the blink of an eye, no![ST:wait ]
